title: FundedYouth App Updates Feed
description: Hype updates, releases, and fixes from the FundedYouth developers.

items.title: [User Portal] 📊 "Student" Is Now "My Progress"
items.content_text:
We've reorganized the **Student** area into a clearer **My Progress** section. 📊

### What Changed
* **🧭 Nav rename**: **Student** is now **My Progress**.
* **🏷️ Sub-menu renames**: **My Progress → Overview**, **My Badges → Badges**, **My Pathways → Pathways**.
* **📰 Consistent headers**: The page title now always reads **My Progress**, with the subtitle showing the section you're on (Overview, Badges, or Pathways).

items.title: [User Portal] 🏷️ Renamed Sessions & Course Navigation
items.content_text:
We've refreshed some navigation labels in the **User Portal** to be clearer. 🏷️

### What Changed
* **Sessions → Events**
* **Browse Events → Schedule**
* **Available Courses → Join a Course**

items.title: [User Portal] 🧭 Reordered Portal Navigation
items.content_text:
We've reordered the **User Portal** navigation for a more intuitive flow. 🧭

### New Order
* **Dashboard → Sessions → Student → Subscription → Billing → Agreements → Profile**

items.title: [User Portal] 🏷️ Subscriptions Nav Renamed to "Membership"
items.content_text:
Small wording tweak in the navigation. 🏷️

### What Changed
* **Subscriptions → Membership**: The **Subscriptions** nav item is now labeled **Membership**.

items.title: [User Portal] 🎟️ Active Memberships: Auto-Enroll in Included Courses
items.content_text:
Active memberships now include **Auto-Enroll** for the courses covered by your membership. 🎉

### What's New
* **🚀 Automatic access**: Courses included in your membership are added for you — no need to join them manually.
* **✅ Always enrolled**: As long as your membership is active, you're auto-enrolled in the included courses.

items.title: [User Portal] 📝 Streamlined Account Registration & Member Agreement
items.content_text:
New accounts now default to **My Child / Other**, and registration is more streamlined. 🎉

### What's New
* **📜 Agreement built in**: The **Portal Member Agreement** now appears at the bottom of the registration form — you'll need to scroll all the way down (aka read it) before you can agree to the terms and create your account.
* **✅ Two-step validation**: After creating your account, validate your email and provide parental validation on the second email to unlock access to the portal.

items.title: [User Portal] 💳 Dashboard: FYBIT Balance & Upcoming Classes
items.content_text:
The **User Portal Dashboard** now keeps you in the loop at a glance. 🎉

### What's New
* **💰 FYBIT balance**: See a notice with your current FYBIT credit balance right on the dashboard.
* **🛒 Buy more credits**: A quick link to top up your credits when you're running low.
* **📅 Upcoming classes**: View your upcoming classes at a glance.

items.title: [User Portal] 🔑 Login: We Recommend Using Your Username
items.content_text:
We're recommending users sign in with their **username** instead of their email. 🔐

### Why
* **👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Shared emails**: If a parent used the same email for multiple children, usernames keep each account distinct.
* **✅ Smoother sign-in**: Switching to your username avoids confusion at login.

items.title: [Fun Labs] ⏰ More Daily Instructional Hours Coming
items.content_text:
We're working on a solution to provide more daily instructional hours. 🚀

### What's Coming
* **🕒 Custom time slots**: If the standard hours don't work for you, we're integrating a custom time slot feature.
* **📬 Stay connected**: More details to come — stay tuned.

items.title: [Public Site] Get Start now Redirected to Portal
items.content_text: Remove the Get Started page. All links pointed to get started now redirect to https://portal.fundedyouth.org/#watch-and-learn

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🚀 New Rocket Workshop Coming Soon
items.content_text:
We're building a new hands-on workshop all about rockets and compression. 🚀

### The Idea
* **🛠️ Simplified design**: Reworking an existing model that relies on an air compressor.
* **🚲 Bike pump system**: Replacing the compressor with a bike pump and a control panel for a simulated launch console.

### How It Works
* **🎯 Assemble**: Students build their own paper rocket.
* **💨 Prime**: Pump to build up air pressure.
* **🔴 Launch**: Hit the launch button to send the rocket flying.

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🗂️ Q-UP: Service Request Tracking
items.content_text:
A new in-house tool is taking shape in the lab. 🚀

### What It Does
* **📋 Track service requests**: Keep tabs on incoming requests so jobs like prints get completed.
* **🙌 Keep volunteers on track**: Helps volunteers know what's in the queue and what's next.
* **🔄 Team in the loop**: Keeps the whole team aware of progress from request to done.

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🗄️ The Vault: In-House File Server
items.content_text:
A new in-house file server for active members. 🔐

### What It Does
* **🗄️ Member file server**: A central place for active members to access files.
* **🧩 Exclusive 3D files**: Gain access to exclusive 3D files for onsite use only.
* **✂️ Laser crafting designs**: Gain access to exclusive laser crafting designs.

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🎨 Filament Visualizer: Preview Materials on 3D Models
items.content_text:
A new experimental tool, currently under development. 🚧

### What It Does
* **📥 Import a model**: Bring in a 3D model.
* **🎨 Assign a material**: Apply a material to preview how the model will look.
* **🚧 Under development**: Still actively being built.

items.title: [Public Site] 🧰 New /apps Page: Tiny Tools & Course Apps
items.content_text:
Introducing a new **/apps** page on the public site. 🎉

### What's New
* **🔗 One place for everything**: The page collects links to the tiny apps and tools used across FundedYouth courses and more.
* **🚀 Quick access**: Jump straight to a course tool without hunting for the link.

items.title: [User Portal] 📊 Storefront POS: View Student Progress & Badges Earned
items.content_text:
The **Storefront POS** now gives you a quick window into each student's journey. 🎉

### What's New
* **📈 View Progress**: See a student's course progress right from the POS.
* **🏅 Badges Earned**: Check which badges a student has earned without leaving the POS.

items.title: [User Portal] 🚦 Pathways: Set a Pathway to Live or Draft
items.content_text:
Pathways now have a **mode** so you can work on them before they go public.

### What Changed
* **🟢 Live or Draft**: A pathway can now be set to **Live** or **Draft**, giving you control over what's visible while you build.

items.title: [User Portal] 📂 Accounts > Progress: Expand a Course to See Student Status
items.content_text:
Tracking how a class is doing is now much easier. 🎉

### What's New
* **🔽 Expandable Courses**: Clicking a course expands the students in the class.
* **🚦 Status at a Glance**: Each student shows their status — **Not Started**, **In Progress**, or **Completed**.

items.title: [User Portal] 🗂️ Admin Menu: Students Is Now “Accounts”
items.content_text:
A small navigation tidy-up in the Admin Portal.

### What Changed
* **✏️ Renamed**: **Students > Students** is now **Accounts**.
* **⬆️ Moved Up**: **Accounts** now sits at the top of the sub-menu for quicker access.

items.title: [User Portal] 🏅 Earn Badges for Completing Courses
items.content_text:
Gamification is here! We've created brand-new **graphical badges** and added them to the portal. 🎉

### How It Works
* **🎓 Complete a Course, Earn a Badge**: Finish a course and a shiny new badge is yours.
* **🏆 Show Off Your Progress**: Collect badges as you work your way through our courses.

This feature is **live now** — start earning! 🚀

items.title: [User Portal] 🗂️ New Admin Page: Event Management
items.content_text:
A brand-new **Event Management** page in the Admin Portal brings everything you need to run an event into one place. 🎉

### What You Can Do
* **📋 See Every Event**: List all current and upcoming events at a glance.
* **👥 View Registered Students**: See exactly who's signed up for each event.
* **✅ Check Students In**: Check a student in to an event when they arrive.
* **🏁 Mark as Completed**: Set a student as completed once they've finished.
* **🚫 Handle No-Shows**: Remove a student from the event if they don't show up.
* **🏅 Award Badges**: Select a student and award a badge right from the event.

items.title: [User Portal] 🛠️ Admin Portal: Synced Logs, POS Shortcuts & Cleaner Navigation
items.content_text:
We've made the Admin Portal smoother to manage day-to-day, from shared logs to a tidier menu.

### Fixed: Notification Syncing
* **🔄 No More Duplicates**: Fixed an internal error in notification syncing. **Notifications**, the **Audit Log**, and the **Error Log** no longer duplicate for every admin. When one admin marks an item as **read** or **completed**, it's marked that way for all admins — so no one gets buried under duplicate alerts and logs.

### POS Shortcuts
* **🎓 Faster Enrollment**: The **Enroll a Student** action on the Dashboard now takes you straight to the **Storefront POS**.
* **📆 Calendar View**: Added a **calendar view** in the POS for Courses and Events — now including the **Course ID**.

### Cleaner Navigation
* **🧭 Rearranged Menu**: **Storefront POS** and **Events Manager** now sit directly under the Dashboard, with a divider after Events Manager for clear separation.
* **👤 All Users**: **User Management** has been renamed **All Users** and moved to the bottom of the menu.

items.title: [User Portal] 📝 Simpler Sign-Up: Account Types & One Combined Agreement
items.content_text:
We've streamlined how you create your account and sign agreements — so getting started is quicker and clearer! 🎉

### Choose Your Account Type
* **👤 Personal Account**: Register as a single user.
* **👨‍👩‍👧 Multi-Child Account**: Register as a parent or guardian for your children. For each child, we automatically create a custom email from your address and the student's name — so you still receive every confirmation. Example: `<your-email>+<student-name>@example.com`.

### One Agreement Instead of Three
* **📄 Combined Agreement**: We merged the **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** agreements into one. Now the only things you sign at registration are the **parental agreement** and this **new combined agreement** — which unlocks the entire portal, including the student menus.
* **✅ Already Signed?**: If you previously signed all three agreements, you've been **automatically signed** to the new one — nothing to do.

items.title: [User Portal] ☀️ New Summer Class Schedule
items.content_text:
Our summer schedule is here — with **three one-hour classes every day**! 🌞

### Daily Class Times
* **1:00 – 2:00 PM**
* **2:00 – 3:00 PM**
* **3:00 – 4:00 PM**

Running **Monday through Friday**.

### Rotating Courses by Day
Entry-level courses are assigned by day — **Monday: 3DP1**, **Tuesday: 3DP2**, **Wednesday: 3DM1**, **Thursday: CDE1**. The Monday/Tuesday and Wednesday course days **alternate each week**, so check your portal calendar for the current week's lineup.

items.title: [User Portal] 🛠️ Admin Portal: Sessions Databank & Events Upgrades
items.content_text:
We've polished the **Sessions** tools in the Admin Portal to make linking classes and events faster and clearer.

### Databank Card View
* **🧹 Simplified Cards**: A cleaner card view that surfaces the key information at a glance.
* **🔗 Link Class to Event**: New field for linking a class directly to its event.
* **🆔 Cleaner Layout**: Removed the ID prefix from the Event Name. The **ID pill** now sits under the description, followed by the category, then the **linked course** and **linked class**.
* **⚡ Auto-Assign Event ID**: A new button auto-assigns the Event ID to the linked Class ID, plus an optional **Auto-Assign Event ID** toggle when a class is linked to an event.
* **❗ Required Field**: Event ID is now a required field.

### Events: From Template
* **🔎 Richer Search**: The **From Template** search popup now includes **Event ID**, **Course ID**, and **Class ID**.

items.title: [Public Site] 🔗 Changelog Link Added to the Footer
items.content_text: Finding out what we're building just got easier! We've added a link to our **Changelog** (a Fun Labs project) right in the **site footer** — so the latest updates are always one click away.

items.title: [Public Site] 📅 Updated Summer Class Schedule
items.content_text:
We've updated our weekly summer class schedule based on the most common requests we've been hearing from you! 🌞

### What Changed
* **🕐 New Hours**: Classes now run **1:00 – 4:00 PM, Monday through Thursday**.
* **📚 All Four Classes Weekly**: All four entry-level classes are now available **every week**.

items.title: [Docs] 📄 Agreements Combined: The Portal Member Agreement
items.content_text:
We've combined three separate agreements — **General**, **Student**, and **Subscription** — into a single **Portal Member Agreement**, streamlining the account creation process.

### What This Means
* **📝 One Agreement**: A single Portal Member Agreement replaces the previous three.
* **⚡ Faster Sign-Up**: Fewer documents to read and sign means a quicker, simpler registration.

items.title: [User Portal] 🏪 Storefront POS: In-Person Account Creation & Sign-Ups
items.content_text:
The **Storefront POS** in the Admin Portal just got a major upgrade — making it possible to get members fully set up in person! 🎉

### What's New
* **👤 Built-In Account Creation**: The new account creation process is now integrated right into the POS. Register a **single user** or sign up as a **parent or guardian** for a child — complete with our **concatenated email** feature.
* **✍️ Sign Agreements In Person**: All required agreements can now be signed on the spot at the storefront.

### The Big Win
**98% of account creation and class registration** can now happen entirely through the Storefront POS. The only thing left for the user to do is click the **email confirmations** — one to confirm their new account, and the **parental agreement** for COPPA compliance.

items.title: [User Portal] ✨ Refreshed Account Creation & Registration
items.content_text:
We've updated the **landing page** to make creating an account and getting registered smoother than ever! 🎉

### What Changed
* **🙌 Clearer Account Creation**: A cleaner, more intuitive sign-up flow right from the landing page.
* **📝 Streamlined Registration**: We tidied up the registration process so getting started takes fewer steps and less guesswork.

### Why It Matters
New members can go from landing on the page to fully registered faster and with less friction.

items.title: [User Portal] 📅 User Registration V2
items.content_text:
We've cleaned up class registration and moved everything into the **Sessions Menu** — so signing up for your courses and classes is simpler than ever! 🎉

### How It Works
* **🎯 Pick a Course**: Select **Available Courses** to join a course. This reveals the upcoming classes available for that course.
* **🗓️ Register for Same-Day Classes**: You can now register for two class sessions on the same day! Just sign up for **Class A** at, say, 4 PM and **Class B** at 5 PM (or any later time). That way you complete the course classes in the correct order.

### Smart Prerequisites
Available Courses only show up once you **meet the prerequisites**. So if you haven't finished **Course A**, you won't be able to join **Course B** or its class sessions — it stays hidden on your portal calendar until you're ready.

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🚀 Introducing the App Launcher
items.content_text:
Say hello to the **App Launcher** — a friendly home base for the makerspace computers that puts everything one click away! 🧪

### What Is It?
The App Launcher is a shortcut landing page that runs **locally on the makerspace computers**. Instead of hunting through bookmarks and desktop icons, you get one tidy launchpad with cards for every app and service you need.

### What's On the Launchpad
* **🛠️ FundedYouth Apps**: Quick-launch cards for the apps we build in-house.
* **🔌 Services We Use**: Handy shortcuts to the third-party tools and services that power the makerspace.

### Why It's Handy
Walk up to any makerspace computer and get to work in seconds — no more digging for the right link.

items.title: [User Portal] 🛒 POS Integration: Buy, Subscribe & Enroll In Person
items.content_text:
Our new **Point of Sale (POS) integration** brings the full power of the User Portal to the front desk — so members can get set up in person, no laptop required! 🎉

### What's New
* **💰 Buy FYBIT Credits**: Purchase FYBIT Credits right at the POS and start using them on the spot.
* **🎟️ Manage Memberships**: Sign up for and handle membership subscriptions in person, handled directly through the POS.
* **📚 Enroll On the Spot**: Register students for **courses, workshops, and class sessions** without leaving the counter.

### Why It Matters
Whether you're joining at an event or stopping by onsite, getting started is now faster and easier than ever — buy credits, pick a membership, and lock in your classes all in one place.

items.title: [The Vault] New App in Development
items.content_text:
🚀 Something exciting is brewing! We're building a brand-new in-house file server exclusively for active members — and we're calling it **The Vault**.

### What is The Vault?
The Vault is your members-only treasure chest of premium resources, available **onsite for active members only**. Think custom 3D models, exclusive assets, and limited edition prints you won't find anywhere else.

### What to Expect
* **🎨 Custom 3D Models**: A curated, ever-growing library built just for our community.
* **💎 Limited Edition Prints**: Exclusive drops reserved for active members — and more on the way.
* **🔒 Members-Only Access**: Premium resources available exclusively onsite.

This project is still in **early development**, and we're just getting started. 📬 **Subscribe to the feed** to be the first to know as The Vault takes shape!

### Stay in the Loop
Don't miss a single drop! [**Sign up for our newsletter**](https://fundedyouth.org/contact) to get the latest updates delivered straight to your inbox.

And give us a follow for behind-the-scenes sneak peeks and announcements:
* 📸 **Instagram**: [@FundedYouth](https://www.instagram.com/FundedYouth/)
* 👍 **Facebook**: [FundedYouth](https://www.facebook.com/FundedYouth)

items.title: [Curriculum] Cura Slicer Basics -  New Course Model (3DP1)
items.content_text:
Cura Slicer Basics is now split into two **1-hour sessions**, giving students room to learn the tool and then put it to work on a realistic job.

### Session 1: Hands-On Slicer Lesson
Our existing hands-on lesson on how to use the **Ultimaker Cura Slicer** application. Students get comfortable navigating the software and preparing a model to print.

### Session 2: Challenges & Estimating
This new session introduces real-world challenges and provides students with a **template for producing an estimate**. The instructor plays the role of a client or customer and makes three requests. For each one, the student will:
1. **Find a model** that fits the request.
2. **Get the customer's approval** on the model.
3. **Write up the estimate** using the provided template.
4. **Confirm the price** with the customer.
5. **Print the file**.

items.title: [Curriculum] New Course: Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)
items.content_text:
A brand-new course has landed! **Bambu Studio Basics (3DP2)** is here, and just like 3DP1, it's split into two fun **1-hour sessions**. 🎉

*Heads up: You'll need to finish the **3DP1 course** first before jumping into this one!*

### Session 1: Learning the Tools
Get hands-on with the **Bambu Studio** app! This first class walks you through all the basic tools so you feel comfortable getting your models ready to print.

### Session 2: Making a Cost Estimate
Want to sell your prints? This class teaches you how to make a real cost estimate through three fun challenges. The instructor plays the role of a client and asks for three different items. For each one, you'll:
1. **Find something** the customer wants.
2. **Produce an estimate** for the job.
3. **Get the customer's confirmation**.
4. **Take the payment**.
5. **Print the product**.
6. **Present it** to the customer.

items.title: [Curriculum] Updated Course: TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)
items.content_text:
We've leveled up our **TinkerCAD 3D Modeling (3DM1)** course! 🎉 It now includes a brand-new **Cost Estimate document** to help students learn how to figure out the time and cost of making 3D models.

*Good news: there are **no prerequisites** for this course — anyone can jump right in!*

### How It Works
The course is split into two **1-hour sessions**, and it's **100% hands-on**. Every lesson builds on the one before it, and you'll always be modeling something brand-new!

### What You'll Do
* **🛠️ Two Modeling Lessons Per Class**: Each session is packed with two hands-on modeling lessons.
* **📐 Learn to Estimate**: Discover how to calculate the time and cost to produce your 3D models.
* **🚀 Build As You Go**: Each lesson grows your skills so you keep getting better and better.

items.title: [Curriculum] 💻 New Course: Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)
items.content_text:
Get ready to code! **Coding with SpriteLab (CDE1)** by Code.org is our newest course — and it's included in your membership at **no extra charge**! 🎉

### What to Expect
This is a fun, three-part course made up of three **1-hour sessions**. It covers all the basic terminology and skills to get you ready for hands-on challenges and real-world scenarios.

### Where It Takes You
This course is your launchpad! It prepares you for bigger adventures in:
* **🌐 Web App Development**
* **📡 IoT (Internet of Things)**
* **🔌 Embedded Design**
* **✨ And so much more!**

Start here and build the foundation for an awesome coding journey!

items.title: [User Portal] User Portal is Live
items.content_text:
The User Portal is officially live, and you can sign up to become a member today! Getting started is quick and easy.

### How to Get Started
* **Create an account**: Sign up and confirm your email to unlock the portal.
* **Buy credits & subscribe**: Grab some credits and pick your membership.
* **Use your benefits**: Join the free classes that come with the basic membership.
* **Spend your FYBIT credits**: Trade them for filament or kick off a 3D print!

### Need a Little Help?
* **Watch our videos**: Follow along with our [YouTube tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E8rDILmQb6M&list=PLqD3DJZs3fm57yyM-hkpIi_3VOyoYxDxx).
* **Read the guide**: Check out our [Getting Started page](https://fundedyouth.org/get-started).

items.title: [Public Site] 🚀 A Brand-New Public Site!
items.content_text:
We gave our **Public Site** a complete makeover from top to bottom! 🎨

### What's New
* **✨ Fresh Design**: A clean, modern look that's easier and more fun to use.
* **🎯 New Focus**: We're shining a spotlight on the [**FundedYouth Portal**](https://portal.fundedyouth.org), our STEM classes, and all the awesome services we offer.
* **📅 Live Schedule**: A brand-new live schedule connected right to the Portal, so you always know what's happening next.

### Become a Member
Our new site makes it super easy to **join and unlock great benefits**. Come explore everything FundedYouth has to offer!

items.title: [Docs] 📖 A Fresh New Look for Our Docs!
items.content_text:
We gave [**docs.fundedyouth.org**](https://docs.fundedyouth.org) a brand-new look and feel to make finding answers easier than ever! ✨

### What's New
* **🧭 Easier Navigation**: We split everything into clear sections so you can find what you need fast — **Getting Started**, **FYBIT Credits**, **Courses**, **Portal**, **Legal**, and **Technical Details**.
* **🎨 Prettier Courses Pages**: We added custom formatting to the Courses pages, so they're cleaner and more fun to read.

### Take a Look
Come explore the new and improved docs — everything you need to know, all in one tidy place!

items.title: [Fun Labs] 🎉 The Changelog App is Live!
items.content_text:
Say hello to our brand-new **Changelog App** — your one-stop spot to see everything FundedYouth is building! 🚀

### What You Can Do
* **🔍 See the Latest**: Browse all our newest changes, fixes, and projects in one place.
* **📬 Subscribe to the Feed**: Never miss an update — follow along with our RSS feed.
* **👋 Follow Us**: Stay connected on social media or sign up to get updates by email.

### Stay in the Loop
This is your window into everything we're working on. Check back often to see what's new!
